title: Grow the Crops
body:
A concept of Twerk Sim 2k16 and SquatGrow!

### Notes:
Sugarcane and Cactus will not be added nor it would be worked on, use Snad or mod that patches these blocks to be bonemealable.

# Features
- Any bonemealable crops
- Integrations with multiple mods such as:
  - Industrial Craft 2
  - AgriCraft
  - Mystical Agriculture

## Additional Info
Blacklist config can be either `minecraft:grass` (MODID:BlOCK_TAG) or `minecraft:*` (MODID:*). the first one will only blacklist that specific block, while the second one will filter for blocks from `MODID`
